items.title: Pistons beat Cavs 103-94. One of the better games this summer, overall. Good stuff from Cavs' rookie Meleek Thomas, some notable defensive flashes from Ebuka Okorie for Detroit (seven steals!), and an Emergent Random Guy in the Pistons' Brice Williams.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Pistons beat Cavs 103-94. One of the better games this summer, overall. Good stuff from Cavs' rookie Meleek Thomas, some notable defensive flashes from Ebuka Okorie for Detroit (seven steals!), and an Emergent Random Guy in the Pistons' Brice Williams.

items.title: FINAL: Pistons 103, Cavs 94. Really nice performances from Lanier (25 points, 7-12 from 3) and Brice Williams (21 points, 6-8 from 3).
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
FINAL: Pistons 103, Cavs 94. Really nice performances from Lanier (25 points, 7-12 from 3) and Brice Williams (21 points, 6-8 from 3). 

Rough shooting from Okorie (14 points, 5-17 overall) but he also tallied 6 assists and 7 steals.

items.title: Sophie Cunningham on Fever's halfway point: "There's a lot of stuff we have to clean up. We're starting to get a little more consistency, which is great... I don't think we have all clicked on the same level yet. Once we do, it's going to be scary."
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Sophie Cunningham on Fever's halfway point: "There's a lot of stuff we have to clean up. We're starting to get a little more consistency, which is great... I don't think we have all clicked on the same level yet. Once we do, it's going to be scary."

More: www.theixsports.com/the-ix-baske...

items.title: Rose Namajunas Kept Fighting With A Broken Nose
items.author: Thanalysis Show
items.body_excerpt: Former UFC champion Rose Namajunas shares one of the toughest moments of her career after breaking her nose during a fight. Unable to breathe properly and dealing with a serious injury, she explains how she stayed focused on one thing: finding a way to win. This conversation is…
